steps.title: Read the y-intercept from the graph
steps.content: The line crosses the y-axis at the point $(0, 2)$.

steps.title: Substitute the point into the equation to find B
steps.content:
Substitute $(0, 2)$ into $4x + By = 12$:

$$4(0) + B(2) = 12$$
$$2B = 12$$
$$B = 6$$

That matches choice D — D is correct.
